name: Vulcan Materials Company
description: Vulcan Materials Company is the nation's largest producer of construction aggregates, primarily crushed stone, sand, and gravel. Headquartered in Birmingham, Alabama, the company plays a vital role in the construction industry by providing essential materials for infrastructure, residential, and commercial projects. In addition to its core aggregates business, Vulcan produces and distributes asphalt mix and ready-mixed concrete. With a vast network of facilities across the United States, the company is a critical supplier for public and private construction sectors, supporting the development of roads, bridges, buildings, and other foundational infrastructure projects.
